payment.title: Finalized Your Reservations
payment.description: Review the seat price first so you can make the payment accordingly.
payment.heading: Finalize Your Reservations
payment.noteText:
This workshop is also part of our talent discovery initiative.
Participants who perform well may be considered for future opportunities at Brand
Republic.
 
Only shortlisted candidates will receive:
- A confirmation email
- Payment details
- Final seat confirmation after fee submission
